risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year loss history: 2020 - 2 claims (EMPLOYERS); 2021 - 9 claims (Chubb); 2022 - 6 claims (Zurich, cancelled); 2023 - 3 claims (Markel); 2024 - 11 claims. Premiums ranged from approximately $580,805 to $630,843.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history shows claim counts of 2 (2020), 9 (2021), 6 (2022), 3 (2023), and 11 (2024). A cancellation occurred in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group.
